title: 10 Herbal Creams For Mucus In Throat
description: Glycyrrhiza glabra creams contains glycyrrhizin, a triterpenoid saponin responsible for its medicinal properties. Glycyrrhizin has anti-inflammatory and demulcent properties, which help soothe and protect the mucous membranes in the throat. The anti-inflammatory properties reduce swelling and redness, while the demulcent properties form a protective barrier that keeps the throat moist and comfortable.
